roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PETITION TO REVOKE POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION PURSUANT TO PC3455/3455REIN /CH1:CJ 6 M /CTS:  25 /4019HALF/CCC:14010553,14012020 & 14015535/
/CAL:SURRENDER & FOR /FTA/BWI/NB/X:POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION IS REVOKED,/OREVKD/BWNUM:1ST/X:2 OF 3 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE /NIGHTSERV/

/CAL:STATUS/X:JUDGE BENSON IS NOT PRESENT TODAY AND THIS CASE CALLED IN D-28 BEFORE JUDGE YAGGY/X:JUDGE YAGGY SPOKE TO JUDGE BENSON OVER THE PHONE REGARDING THIS MATTER/X:THE SENTENCE OF 6 MONTHS COUNTY JAIL IMPOSE ON 06-20-14 IS SET ASIDE  AND VACATED AS AUTHORIZED BY JUDGE BENSON/X:THE ADMISSION OF VIOLATION OF PC 3455 PRCS ON 06-20-14 REMAINS/DEF:IS OR'D TODAY 6-23-14 WITH 3 MONTHS HAMMER TO ATTEND HIS GRANMOTHER'S FUNERAL AND TO SURRENDER ON 07-02-14 -THIS IS PER AGREEMENT WITH JUDGE BENSON ON 06-20-14/TWS/OR/X:IF DEFENDANT FAILED TO SURRENDER ON 07-02-14, DEFENDANT TO SERVE THE 6 MONTHS COUNTY JAIL AND THE 3 MONTHS HAMMER/X:THE 3 MONTHS HAMMER IS ONLY AS TO CASE NO, 14015535/CONTD:SURRENDER ON 7-02-14 IN D-22 & SENTENCE AFTER ADMISSION OF  VIOLATION OF PC 3455 PRCS/DOP/X:D-22 WILL TRANSFER CASE TO JUDGE BENSON/

/CAL:SENTENCING/CAL:PETITION TO REVOKE POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISIONPURSUANT TO PC3455/3455ADM/3455REIN/CH1:CJ 180D/CTS:11/4019HALF/X:3 MONTHS HAMMER WILL BE IMPOSED IF DEFENDANT PICKS UP NEW CASE WHILE HE IS OUT OF CUSTODY AND IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO SURRENDER ON DATE GIVEN BY THE COURT/X:PROBATION EXTENDED TO 06-16-15/X:TO FOLLOW JUDGE BENSON/
/CAL:TS APD 3455PC HRG/CAL:PETITION TO REVOKE POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION PURSUANT TO PC3455/3455ADM/CH1:CJ 180D/CTS:11/4019HALF/
/CAL:APD 3455PC MOT/CTORD:PRCS ADM REVOKED/SHER/NB/CONTD:TO SET PRCS HRG/DOP/
